subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Sacred Divine Threshold! The Sun of Truth hath shone forth from the horizon of the world and ascended to the zenith of the heavens [3.5s]... ...A Baha'í is known by the attributes manifested by him, not by his name: he is recognized by his character, not by his person... We should memorize the Hidden Words, follow the exhortations of the Incomparable Lord, and conduct ourselves in a manner
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان آستان مقدس الهی شمس حقیقت از افق عالم اشراق فرمود و در قطب آفاق در
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @exhortations and counsels, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
